requirement_topic.en: Sonelgaz Grid Connection — 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz EV Charging Sites
requirement_topic.zh: Sonelgaz并网接入——230 V / 400 V、50 Hz电动汽车充电站点
requirement_topic.zht: Sonelgaz併網接入——230 V / 400 V、50 Hz電動汽車充電站點

summary.en: Algeria's public electricity system is operated through Sonelgaz group entities under the national electricity and gas regulatory framework overseen by CREG. Algeria uses a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply. Public or fleet EV charging sites should therefore be reviewed as electrical installations, not only as imported products: supply capacity, metering, earthing, short-circuit protection, residual-current protection, load management, harmonic emission, commissioning, and local utility coordination must be confirmed with Sonelgaz or the project owner before energization. DC fast-charging projects may require distribution-network capacity review or a dedicated transformer depending on charger power and site conditions.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚公共电力系统由Sonelgaz集团相关实体运营，并处于CREG监管的国家电力与燃气框架之下。阿尔及利亚采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供电。公共或车队EV充电站点因此应按电气安装工程审查，而不仅是进口产品审查：供电容量、计量、接地、短路保护、剩余电流保护、负载管理、谐波发射、调试及当地电力公司协调，均须在送电前与Sonelgaz或项目业主确认。直流快充项目可能因充电功率和站点条件而需要配电网容量审查或专用变压器。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞公共電力系統由Sonelgaz集團相關實體運營，並處於CREG監管的國家電力與燃氣框架之下。阿爾及利亞採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供電。公共或車隊EV充電站點因此應按電氣安裝工程審查，而不僅是進口產品審查：供電容量、計量、接地、短路保護、剩餘電流保護、負載管理、諧波發射、調試及當地電力公司協調，均須在送電前與Sonelgaz或項目業主確認。直流快充項目可能因充電功率和站點條件而需要配電網容量審查或專用變壓器。

standards_or_laws: Sonelgaz grid-connection and distribution-network requirements for electrical installations
CREG electricity and gas regulatory framework
IEC 61851-1 (Mode 3 AC and Mode 4 DC conductive charging system requirements)
IEC 61000 series (power quality, harmonics, EMC for grid-connected equipment)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are normally reviewed under local grid-company procedures, GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 29781 charging-station practice, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. China's common supply baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. The nominal frequency aligns with Algeria, but input-voltage range, protective devices, harmonic limits, documentation, and local utility acceptance must be re-confirmed for Algeria.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电设备安装通常按当地电网公司流程、GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 29781充电站实践、GB/T 20234接口以及直流充电GB/T 27930通信进行审查。中国常见供电基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。频率与阿尔及利亚标称一致，但输入电压范围、保护装置、谐波限值、文件和当地电力公司验收均须为阿尔及利亚重新确认。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電設備安裝通常按當地電網公司流程、GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 29781充電站實踐、GB/T 20234接口以及直流充電GB/T 27930通訊進行審查。中國常見供電基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。頻率與阿爾及利亞標稱一致，但輸入電壓範圍、保護裝置、諧波限值、文件和當地電力公司驗收均須為阿爾及利亞重新確認。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Prepare an Algeria site package with charger input-voltage ratings for 230 V / 400 V at 50 Hz, single-line diagram, load calculation, earthing and RCD design, harmonic and EMC data, metering details, commissioning plan, and Sonelgaz coordination record. Do not treat China grid acceptance or a 220 V / 380 V nameplate as sufficient without confirming voltage range and site connection requirements.
gap.zh: 应准备阿尔及利亚站点资料包，包括230 V / 400 V、50 Hz输入额定确认、单线图、负荷计算、接地和RCD设计、谐波及电磁兼容数据、计量详情、调试计划及Sonelgaz协调记录。不得在未确认电压范围和站点接入要求的情况下，将中国并网验收或220 V / 380 V铭牌视为充分依据。
gap.zht: 應準備阿爾及利亞站點資料包，包括230 V / 400 V、50 Hz輸入額定確認、單線圖、負荷計算、接地和RCD設計、諧波及電磁兼容數據、計量詳情、調試計畫及Sonelgaz協調記錄。不得在未確認電壓範圍和站點接入要求的情況下，將中國併網驗收或220 V / 380 V銘牌視為充分依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected EV charging sites; exact Sonelgaz connection path, metering, protection, and capacity requirements depend on the site and charger power
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not transferable to Sonelgaz or Algeria project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Algeria's 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz grid is close to China domestic charger voltage practice, but Sonelgaz site acceptance, protection, metering, and power-quality requirements must be confirmed for each installation. China grid approval is not an Algeria grid-connection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿尔及利亚230 V / 400 V、50 Hz电网与中国国内充电设备电压实践接近，但每个安装项目均须确认Sonelgaz站点验收、保护、计量和电能质量要求。中国并网批准不是阿尔及利亚并网批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿爾及利亞230 V / 400 V、50 Hz電網與中國國內充電設備電壓實踐接近，但每個安裝項目均須確認Sonelgaz站點驗收、保護、計量和電能質量要求。中國併網批准不是阿爾及利亞併網批准。
